## Checklist

- [ ] I did **not** commit private voice samples, API tokens, `.env`, unredacted DBs, or restricted model weights
- [ ] Docs/licence claims match [NOTICE.md](../NOTICE.md) / [docs/ENGINE_LICENSING.md](../docs/ENGINE_LICENSING.md)
- [ ] Responsible-use / consent language is not overstated
- [ ] `ruff check app/ scripts/ tests/` passes
- [ ] `pytest tests/ -q` passes
- [ ] New engines include readiness + licence notes (if applicable)
